diagnosis: The v1 engine consumed one substitution window for each individual replacement and scheduled only one replacement at each of three regulation marks, making the declared five-substitution rule operationally unreachable in ordinary matches.

correction.window_allocation_rule: At each remaining tactical window, replace ceil(remaining substitutions / remaining windows) distinct active outfield players; this produces 2+2+1 when no injury window has already been consumed.

authorization_policy: The exploratory v1 comparison is not reused. The corrected engine must repeat engineering tests, external event compatibility, the isolated 2,000-match validation and all release gates before any definitive 10,000-match execution.
scientific_interpretation: Rules implementation correction applied symmetrically and before the confirmatory result; not an outcome-directed ability or team-strength adjustment.
